Camera.expected_frequency: periodic cloud sync plus optional continuous video activity
suspicious_patterns: camera sends tracking or advertising traffic unrelated to video or device management
camera opens plaintext external management endpoints
camera communicates with many unrelated third-party domains
Camera.notes_en: Cameras commonly maintain cloud API access, device status updates, firmware checks, and may use RTSP or vendor-specific streaming endpoints.
Camera.notes_ja: カメラはクラウド API、状態送信、ファーム更新確認を行い、RTSP やベンダ独自の映像配信先を使うことがある。

Hub.expected_frequency: steady orchestration traffic with bursts during device events or pairing
suspicious_patterns: hub communicates directly with unrelated consumer content or advertising services
hub exposes plaintext admin access to external networks
hub generates large outbound traffic without matching automation or device activity
Hub.notes_en: Hubs usually coordinate local devices and cloud services, so they show steady orchestration traffic and occasional pairing or automation bursts.
Hub.notes_ja: ハブはローカル機器とクラウドを仲介するため、定常的な制御通信とペアリング時のバースト通信が発生しやすい。

Sensor.expected_frequency: low-rate periodic updates with bursts only on state changes
suspicious_patterns: sensor streams large volumes of data continuously without a matching sensing purpose
sensor communicates with unrelated media, advertising, or social domains
sensor exposes plaintext admin or file-transfer services externally
Sensor.notes_en: Sensors generally send small periodic telemetry and event-driven updates, often over MQTT, CoAP, or HTTPS.
Sensor.notes_ja: センサーは小さい定期テレメトリとイベント発生時の更新が中心で、MQTT、CoAP、HTTPS を使うことが多い。

Controller.expected_frequency: mostly idle with bursts when users toggle or automate devices
suspicious_patterns: controller sends high-volume analytics or unrelated outbound traffic
controller uses plaintext external APIs for management
controller communicates with many unrelated destinations outside its vendor ecosystem
Controller.notes_en: Controllers are usually quiet until user actions or automations occur, then they talk to vendor APIs or local peers for state changes.
Controller.notes_ja: コントローラは通常は静かで、ユーザー操作や自動化のタイミングでベンダ API やローカル機器と通信する。

Appliance.expected_frequency: low background traffic with spikes during remote control, diagnostics, or firmware updates
suspicious_patterns: appliance communicates with unrelated tracking or advertising services
appliance exposes unexpected external admin or file-sharing services
appliance sustains continuous outbound traffic without user interaction or device activity
Appliance.notes_en: Connected appliances usually maintain light background cloud connectivity and only spike during remote control, diagnostics, or updates.
Appliance.notes_ja: 接続家電は通常は軽いバックグラウンド通信が中心で、遠隔操作、診断、更新時に通信量が増える。

VoiceAssistant.expected_frequency: steady cloud connectivity with higher activity during wake-word or command processing
suspicious_patterns: voice assistant sends plaintext traffic carrying command or user data externally
voice assistant talks to unrelated third-party domains outside the assistant ecosystem
voice assistant exposes local admin interfaces not required for pairing
VoiceAssistant.notes_en: Voice assistants are highly cloud-dependent and typically keep steady HTTPS/TLS sessions for command handling, account sync, and firmware updates.
VoiceAssistant.notes_ja: 音声アシスタントはクラウド依存が強く、コマンド処理、アカウント同期、更新のために HTTPS/TLS 通信を継続しやすい。

Wearable.expected_frequency: mostly sync-oriented bursts when paired apps upload health or activity data
suspicious_patterns: wearable sends large outbound traffic continuously without sync activity
wearable uses plaintext channels for health or account-related data
wearable communicates with unrelated domains outside its vendor ecosystem
Wearable.notes_en: Wearables are usually app-paired devices that sync health or activity data to vendor clouds over HTTPS/TLS.
Wearable.notes_ja: ウェアラブルはアプリ連携型が多く、健康・活動データをベンダクラウドへ HTTPS/TLS で同期することが多い。

metadata.description: Behavior baseline database for Quarant. Each category describes what network behavior is usually expected before anomaly or risk evaluation.
metadata.description_ja: Quarant 向けの挙動ベースラインDB。異常判定やリスク照合の前に、カテゴリごとの通常通信を定義する。
